note: Curated direct-download (DDL) source candidates for Opal. WARNING: the aggregator DDL lists are ~140 regional movie/TV blog sites (vegamovies/pahe/moviesflix/hdhub clones) that rotate domains constantly and each need bespoke scraping — high rot, low durability. Only the more stable release-group indexes and the anime-DDL sources (which have cleaner structure) are cataloged here; the regional-blog firehose is excluded. Source: FMHY video 'Download Sites' + 'Anime DDL' sections. None in the live manifest.

release_group_ddl.name: HDEncode
release_group_ddl.notes: Release-scene DDL index (encodes, links to filehosts). More structured/durable than the regional blogs.

release_group_ddl.name: PSArips
release_group_ddl.notes: PSA release group DDL. Filehost links (needs a debrid/host resolver downstream).

anime_ddl.name: nibl
anime_ddl.api: https://api.nibl.co.uk (documented JSON — XDCC bot pack index)
anime_ddl.notes: XDCC pack search API. Clean JSON, but delivery is over IRC XDCC — a transport Opal doesn't have. Catalog now, transport later.

anime_ddl.name: Kayoanime
anime_ddl.notes: Google-Drive-backed anime DDL. Link-resolution is the hard part.

anime_ddl.name: Hi10Anime
anime_ddl.notes: 10-bit anime encodes, DDL. Free account may be needed.

anime_ddl.name: NoobSubs
anime_ddl.notes: Dual-audio (Eng) anime encodes + torrent options. r/Piracy anime.

excluded_regional_blogs.reason: ~140 regional movie/TV DDL blogs (vegamovies, pahe, moviesflix, hdhub, worldfree4u, katmoviehd, etc.) with monthly domain churn and per-site scraping. Not durable; a debrid/Stremio-addon path serves the same need far more stably.

warez_scene.name: Meawfy
warez_scene.notes: Search index over Mega.nz files (9M+ items). Link-resolution downstream. r/Piracy all-purpose.

warez_scene.name: Scnlog
warez_scene.notes: Scene release DB, music-leaning. r/Piracy all-purpose.

excluded_forums.reason: Sign-up/invite forums (DirtyWarez, WarezBook, WarezForums) and the TorrentLeech private tracker — not public API endpoints.
